articles.title: RBI Holds Repo Rate Steady at 6.5% Amid Inflation Concerns
articles.summary: The Reserve Bank of India maintained its key lending rate at 6.5% for the eighth consecutive time, citing persistent food inflation. The central bank revised its GDP growth forecast upward to 7.2% for FY2025-26.
articles.why_it_matters: As an investor, this signals continued stability in borrowing costs, impacting your equity and fixed-income portfolio decisions.

articles.title: Zomato acquires quick-commerce rival Blinkit for $2.1 billion
articles.summary: Zomato has completed its acquisition of Blinkit in a deal valued at $2.1 billion, making it the largest quick-commerce consolidation in India. The combined entity will serve over 50 million monthly users.
articles.why_it_matters: This matters because the quick-commerce consolidation reshapes competitive dynamics in a sector you're tracking as a startup investor.

articles.title: India's GDP Growth Accelerates to 8.4% in Q3 FY2025
articles.summary: India's economy grew at 8.4% in the October-December quarter, driven by strong manufacturing and services output. This positions India as the fastest-growing major economy globally.
articles.why_it_matters: As an investor, India's outperformance strengthens the case for overweighting Indian equities in your emerging market allocation.

articles.title: Startup Funding in India Rebounds: $4.2 Billion Raised in Q1 2025
articles.summary: Indian startups raised $4.2 billion across 310 deals in Q1 2025, marking a 45% increase from the same period last year. AI and climate-tech startups led the recovery.
articles.why_it_matters: This matters because the funding rebound signals renewed investor confidence in Indian tech, validating early-stage portfolio bets.

articles.title: SEBI Tightens Rules for SME IPOs to Protect Retail Investors
articles.summary: SEBI has introduced stricter norms for SME IPOs including higher promoter lock-in periods and mandatory profitability track records. The new rules aim to curb the recent surge in overvalued small-cap listings.
articles.why_it_matters: As an investor, these regulations will filter out weaker SME listings, potentially improving the quality of small-cap investment opportunities.

articles.title: India's Renewable Energy Capacity Crosses 200 GW Milestone
articles.summary: India has achieved its target of 200 GW renewable energy capacity ahead of schedule, led by solar installations in Rajasthan and Gujarat. The government has now set a revised target of 500 GW by 2030.
articles.why_it_matters: This matters because the energy transition creates investment opportunities in green infrastructure and clean-tech companies.

articles.title: TCS Wins $1.5 Billion Deal with UK Banking Giant for AI Transformation
articles.summary: Tata Consultancy Services has secured its largest-ever deal worth $1.5 billion from a major UK bank for a comprehensive AI-led digital transformation spanning five years.
articles.why_it_matters: As an investor, this mega-deal validates the AI transformation thesis and signals strong demand for Indian IT services.

articles.title: Government Announces Union Budget 2025: Focus on Infrastructure and AI
articles.summary: The Union Budget 2025-26 allocated ₹11.1 lakh crore for infrastructure, a 25% increase. A new ₹10,000 crore fund for AI startups was announced along with tax incentives for semiconductor manufacturing.
articles.why_it_matters: This matters because the budget's AI and infra focus creates multi-year investment themes across technology and capital goods sectors.
